settings.title: Free Site Health Checks Through April
settings.excerpt: Spring is a quiet stretch for us, so we are giving away thirty minute reviews of slow or aging sites.
settings.body:
Every spring our pipeline thins out for a few weeks, and rather than fill the gap with busywork we would rather spend it helping local businesses.

Through the end of April we will run a free thirty minute health check on your existing site. We look at load speed, broken links, mobile layout, and anything that might be quietly costing you visitors.

You walk away with a short written list, ranked by impact. No pitch attached, though we are happy to talk if something on the list needs real work.
